summary: Iteration 38 - Image Upload Bug Testing. All backend upload APIs working correctly (14/14 tests passed). All frontend upload buttons are clickable and functional. The reported issue about upload buttons not working could NOT be reproduced - all buttons work correctly in testing.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all upload buttons verified as clickable and functional)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test images generated in memory
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 tested image upload functionality. All 3 upload APIs (/api/upload/logo, /api/upload/image, /api/upload/background) are working correctly. Frontend upload buttons in Super Admin panel (system logo, login page backgrounds) and Settings page (product/category images) are all clickable and functional. The reported bug about upload buttons not working could NOT be reproduced - all buttons work correctly. The issue may have been browser-specific, cache-related, or already fixed by the duplicate state definition removal mentioned in the agent context.

bug_reproduction_status.reported_issue: Upload buttons not working (system logo, backgrounds, product/category images)
bug_reproduction_status.testing_method: Playwright automation + manual API testing with curl
bug_reproduction_status.conclusion: All upload functionality is working correctly. Buttons are clickable, file inputs are triggered, and APIs accept and process uploads successfully.
